description: This Kotlin source file defines the HistoryActivity class for an Android app. It manages displaying a list of historical entries, allowing users to view and clear history data. It also contains an inner class, HistoryAdapter, for populating ListView items with formatted date and relation data.

classes.name: HistoryAdapter
classes.description: An inner class extending BaseAdapter to provide views for each history entry in the ListView, formatting date and relation info.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Initializes the activity, sets up UI components, and loads the history repository.

methods.name: onResume
methods.description: Refreshes the display when activity resumes.

methods.name: render
methods.description: Updates the UI based on the current history entries, showing a message if empty or populating the list.
